text:
APLCTN_DT 

LABEL: Part D Plan application date 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the date the Part D plan sponsor received the election form from the beneficiary. 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

FILE(S): Part D Beneficiary Plan Election file 

VALUES: Date value formatted as: DDMONYYYY 

COMMENT: — 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
